aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Ventflow Services due to the absence of structured data and conversational content. They are missing out on AI-driven search visibility.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup with relevant details (e.g., address, services, reviews).
Create an FAQ section addressing common customer queries about dryer vent and air duct cleaning.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate contact information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
No engagement with customer questions in the Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for instructional content.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from identifying Ventflow as a reliable local service provider.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'dryer vent cleaning in Kent, WA' or 'air duct cleaning services near me'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding LocalBusiness schema markup to provide AI with essential business information.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as an expert through detailed FAQ content and instructional articles using HowTo schema.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven visibility for your HVAC business.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, Ventflow is missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants like ChatGPT and voice search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The website lacks critical schema markup and conversational content, making it less likely for AI to recommend their services.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to make Ventflow the top choice for AI-driven search queries.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search—waiting means losing ground and potential customers.

email_subject_line: Boost AI Visibility: Your Path to Top HVAC Rankings
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI-driven search presence.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI search and boost your lead generation.
business_name: Ventflow Dryer Vent And Air Duct Cleaning Service
